description: CSS adjustments and UI tweaks for season cards modal, player cards modal, legend icons, and Oshu hex color
steps: 1. In src/App.css, change .season-cards-theme-toggle left from 3.8rem to 1.8rem
2. In src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx, change the legend-button-wrapper inline style from left:'7.5rem' to left:'5.5rem'

3. In src/App.css, change .legend-button-wrapper (the general class used in PlayerCardsModal) left to 23.5rem - but this is inline in PlayerCardsModal.tsx so change PlayerCardsModal.tsx legend-button-wrapper style left from '0.9rem' to '4.9rem'
4. In src/App.css, change .season-cards-modal max-width from 900px to 1000px, and add margin-top:-15px

5. In src/utils/renderCardEffect.tsx, increase shinto icon size from 14 to approximately 17 (20% larger). The icon map uses size 14 for all icons, so specifically for shinto make it ~17px. Best approach: add a SIZE_MAP or handle shinto case specially.

6. In the legend tooltip in SeasonCardsModal.tsx and PlayerCardsModal.tsx, change icon colors: VPIcon color to red (#e94560), CoinIcon color to gold (#c8a951), HonorIcon color to purple (#9b59b6), FistIcon color to blue (#3498db). Currently all are white.

7. In src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx, change the card onClick to always allow clicking the illustration to view zoomed (even if card is disabled/unaffordable). Remove pointerEvents:'none' from the card container but keep buy button disabled.

8. In src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx, change the discount text from '(discount -CoinIcon)' to '(discount -1 CoinIcon)' and change the CoinIcon in discount to use size=23 with stroke='#27ae60' and strokeWidth='2'. The CoinIcon SVG should be <svg width='23' height='23' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='#27ae60' stroke-width='2'>
9. In src/components/GameBoard.tsx, change the HARVEST_BADGE_META color for oshu from '#9B8EC4' to '#B0BEC5' (Luna troop color). Add a comment preserving the old color: '/* previous: #9B8EC4 */'

10. In src/components/PlayerCardsModal.tsx, add text-shadow/border to clan name for better readability: 1px white text-stroke and shadow. Also change .theme-toggle-track inline or CSS to add left:-0.5rem. Change the legend-button-wrapper style top:'0.6rem', left:'4.9rem', zIndex:1
11. In src/App.css, add left:-0.5rem to .theme-toggle-track (or add it as a position relative style in the toggle wrapper in PlayerCardsModal)
acceptance_criteria: Season cards modal has theme toggle at left:1.8rem, legend at left:5.5rem
Player cards modal has clan name with white text-shadow, toggle-track with left:-0.5rem, legend at left:4.9rem
Season cards modal max-width is 1000px with margin-top:-15px
Shinto icon in card text is 20% larger than other icons
Legend icons have colored icons matching card text (VP red, Coin gold, Honor purple, Force blue)
Disabled cards can still be clicked to view zoomed image
Discount text shows '-1' followed by green coin SVG (23x23)
Oshu hex reward color is #B0BEC5 with old color commented
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build
findings: All 11 steps implemented successfully. tsc --noEmit and npm run build both pass cleanly. The CSS file is minified on single lines - edits targeted specific property values within the minified content.
